info.name: Yaqazah Driving Sessions API
info.description: Postman collection to test the driver registration, authentication, and session upload endpoints for the Yaqazah application.

request.description: Registers a new independent driver in the system. On registration, an OTP is sent to their email and stored in Redis.

Verifies the driver's email using the OTP code. Retrieve the OTP code from Redis using:
`redis-cli GET OTP_VERIFY:driver@yaqazah.com`
This request automatically sets the `token` environment variable on success.

header.value: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 16_5 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/16.5 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1
header.description: Forced mobile user agent so that DeviceInterceptor marks isMobile=true (required for driver logins)

request.description: Logs in the driver. The request MUST include a User-Agent header with the word "mobile" or it will be rejected with 403 Forbidden under device enforcement rules.

Uploads the driving session along with its event logs. Drivers are not allowed to specify a `userId` belonging to other users. If `photoBase64` is provided, it will automatically be converted to a file and uploaded to storage.
